models.name: Prepayment Model (CPR)
models.short_description: Models the conditional prepayment rate of mortgage pools as a function of rate incentives, seasoning, and burnout.
models.key_insight: Prepayment is a homeowner's free option: they refinance when rates drop.

models.name: Option-Adjusted Spread (OAS)
models.short_description: Decomposes bond spread into option cost and residual compensation by simulating cash flows across rate paths.
models.key_insight: OAS strips out option cost to reveal pure credit/liquidity compensation.
